subject: F6: run 11-step verification sequence
description: Execute the F6 smoke sequence: ./hsim help, list fixtures, run (no-build path), build, list (unchanged), run csr, run csr -v, run rt_all_gprs csr, run rt_c_v_regs pc, test --filter rt_c --mode csr, test (full). Tick each step against expected outcome.
